description:
You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). BuildingTech Solutions is establishing a new R&D Engineering department and you must provision their complete access infrastructure.

Create a time profile named 'Flex Hours' with schedule Monday-Friday 07:00-21:00, Saturday 09:00-17:00, Sunday off. Create a user group named 'R&D Engineering'. Create a zone named 'R&D Lab' with authentication mode 'Card and PIN' and description 'Engineering workspace'. Create an access rule named 'R&D Access' linking group 'R&D Engineering' to zone 'R&D Lab' with time profile 'Flex Hours', and another rule named 'IT Lab Support' linking group 'IT Department' to zone 'R&D Lab' with time profile 'Extended Hours'.

Create two new users in the 'R&D Engineering' group with company 'BuildingTech Solutions': Amelia Chen (a.chen@buildingtech.com, +1-312-555-0301, RFID card 0006700001, PIN 223344) and Marcus Rivera (m.rivera@buildingtech.com, +1-312-555-0302, RFID card 0006700002, PIN 223344).

Transfer existing employee Darnell Robinson to R&D Engineering by adding him to the 'R&D Engineering' group, updating his email to d.robinson@rd.buildingtech.com, and assigning PIN 223344 while keeping his existing RFID card.

Since the R&D Lab zone requires Card+PIN authentication, also assign PIN 223344 to IT Department members Kwame Asante and Mei-Ling Zhang, keeping their existing RFID cards.

Save a provisioning report to ~/Documents/rd_onboarding.txt listing all created infrastructure, new users with credentials, the transferred employee, and all credential updates.
